project_metadata.name: sandbox-repoguard
project_metadata.description: A Python/FastAPI backend API. No frontend code.

forbidden_patterns: Hardcoded API keys or secrets in source code
Direct database manipulation outside of ORM or repository layer
Synchronous blocking calls inside async endpoint handlers
print() statements used for logging instead of the logging module

auto_reject_criteria: Addition of any frontend assets (HTML, CSS, JS, TSX) to this backend-only repository
Addition of package.json, node_modules, or any npm/yarn configuration
Modification of authentication or security middleware without the 'security-review' label on the MR
